'''Jolee's robe''' was a gray article of [[Jedi apparel/Legends|clothing]] believed to have been owned by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jolee Bindo]] before [[3951 BBY]].

==Behind the scenes==
Jolee's robe is an equippable item of clothing the [[Meetra Surik|player]] may discover in [[Obsidian Entertainment]]'s [[2004]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''. Were the player character to wear this garment, it would boost their Charisma attribute, which augments their persuasive air, and it slightly bolsters the regeneration of their [[personal Force reservoir]], which allows the use of [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
